name: nowledge-mem
description: Cross-tool memory for Kimi Work. Recall past decisions, search prior threads, and import Kimi Work sessions into Nowledge Mem.
skillInstructions: Use Nowledge Mem for durable cross-tool memory. Prefer MCP tools when they are connected; use nmem CLI as the fallback and for Kimi Work transcript import.

interface.shortDescription: Memory that follows you across Kimi Work and your other AI tools
interface.longDescription: Loads startup context, guides memory retrieval and distillation, and can import Kimi Work conversations into Nowledge Mem threads with nmem.
